visual_description: A man with glasses and a light-colored suit jacket is shown in a close-up, looking directly at the camera with a slight smile. The scene then cuts to a nighttime street where three men walk together; the man in the center, wearing a floral shirt, looks concerned and glances around nervously. The man on the left wears a red jacket and a patterned head covering, while the man on the right is in a dark shirt.
audio_description: A male voice speaks in a calm, conversational tone in what sounds like a Chinese dialect. The background is quiet, with no other prominent sounds.
